mapper.select:
SELECT VOLUN_ACT_NO, VOLUN_ACT_TITLE, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END, CASE WHEN SYSDATE < VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN THEN '모집예정' WHEN SYSDATE < VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END + 1 THEN '모집중' ELSE '모집마감' END AS RECRU_STATUS FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY WHERE VOLUN_ACT_ORGAN_NO = #{volunActOrganNo}
AND ( (#{actType} = 'environment' AND VOLUN_ACT_ACT_TYPE = 1) OR (#{actType} = 'medical' AND VOLUN_ACT_ACT_TYPE = 2) OR (#{actType} = 'education' AND VOLUN_ACT_ACT_TYPE = 3) )
AND ( (#{recruitStatus} = 'before-recruit' AND SYSDATE < VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN) OR (#{recruitStatus} = 'recruit' AND SYSDATE >= VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN AND SYSDATE < VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END + 1) OR (#{recruitStatus} = 'recruit-end' AND SYSDATE >= VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END + 1) )
AND VOLUN_ACT_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END DESC
